# Helpful Money

Financial tools, calculators, and resources to help you make better decisions with your money. Ancient wisdom meets modern tools.

## Key Sections

- **Tools**: Free financial calculators.
    - [Budget Planner](/tools/budget/)
    - [Mortgage Calculator](/tools/mortgage/)
    - [Mortgage Overpayment Calculator](/tools/mortgage-overpayment-calculator/)
    - [Mortgage Affordability Calculator](/tools/afford/)
    - [Pension Calculator](/tools/pension/)
- **Wisdom**: The Babylon Series - [7 Cures for a Lean Purse](/babylon/)
- **Blog**: Financial insights and stories - [/blog/](/blog/)
- **About**: The story behind Helpful Money - [/about/](/about/)

## Core Philosophy
- Ancient principles like compounding interest and discipline.
- Transparent, simple, and functional tools.
- Authenticity and personal experience from bankruptcy to financial freedom.
